unchained/constants

    Dark Mode
  • Index
Search:
Group by:
  • Imports
  • Lets
    • c
    • ε_0

    • m_μ

  Source   Edit

A (so far small) set of (mostly physics related) constants defined in the units of Unchained.

Imports

units

Lets

c = Meter•Second⁻¹(299792458.0)
  Source   Edit 
ε_0 =
  type
    Meter⁻¹•Second•Ampere•Volt⁻¹ = distinct CompoundQuantity
  Meter⁻¹•Second•Ampere•Volt⁻¹(float(8.8541878128e-12))
  Source   Edit 
e = C(1.602176634e-19)
  Source   Edit 
m_e = kg(9.1093837015e-31)
  Source   Edit 
m_e_c2 = MeV(0.510998928)
  Source   Edit 
N_A =
  type
    Mol⁻¹ = distinct CompoundQuantity
  Mol⁻¹(float(6.02214076e+23))
  Source   Edit 
M_u =
  type
    KiloGram•Mol⁻¹ = distinct CompoundQuantity
  KiloGram•Mol⁻¹(float(0.00099999999965))
  Source   Edit 
m_μ_eV = eV(105658375.5)
  Source   Edit 
m_μ = kg(1.883531627e-28)
  Source   Edit 
π = 3.141592653589793
  Source   Edit 
r_e =
  Meter(float do:
    type
      Second²•Ampere² = distinct CompoundQuantity
    Second²•Ampere²(float(e) * float(e)) /
      float do:
    type
      Meter⁻¹•Second²•Ampere² = distinct CompoundQuantity
    Meter⁻¹•Second²•Ampere²(float do:
      type
        Meter⁻²•Second³•Ampere² = distinct CompoundQuantity
      Meter⁻²•Second³•Ampere²(float do:
        type
          Meter⁻³•Second⁴•Ampere² = distinct CompoundQuantity
        Meter⁻³•Second⁴•Ampere²(float do:
          type
            KiloGram⁻¹•Meter⁻³•Second⁴•Ampere² = distinct CompoundQuantity
          KiloGram⁻¹•Meter⁻³•Second⁴•Ampere²(
              float(4 * π) * float(ε_0)) *
            float(m_e)) *
          float(c)) *
        float(c)))
  Source   Edit

Made with Nim. Generated: 2021-07-11 21:30:02 UTC
